title: Blue's ToggleSneak
description: Adds a keybind that allows players to easily toggle sneak on and off.
body:
Blueishberry presents... 
## Blue's Toggle Sneak!

You can have both a sneak key and a toggle sneak key.

This mod adds a second keybind that when you press it, it will toggle sneaking on or off (depending on the current state). This allows for a more seamless Minecraft experience as you don't have to go into the controls menu every single time you want to turn toggle sneak on or off.

-Blueishberry
